findings.detail: All callers verified — none pass shadow_votes. post_gate1.py:239 calls generate_decision() without shadow_votes keyword. No other callers found (grep verified across entire codebase). The parameter removal is complete: signature cleaned, all integration points updated, dead code removed. Zero backward compatibility risk — this was always hardcoded to None.

Imports from gateway/async_client (chat_pro), pipeline stages (L1/L2/L3/red_team/resonance), TYPE_CHECKING from fragility_scanner and cross_border_analyzer. Zero imports from shadows/. Zero imports from gate* modules. Clean dependency DAG: gateway + pipeline stages → decision.

Input: pipeline analysis results (L1, L2, L3, Red Team, Resonance) + optional Phase H enhancements (hypotheses, fragility_report, cross_border_report). Processing: build prompt → chat_pro() → parse JSON → DecisionOutput. Output: DecisionOutput with decision_cards + no_trade_card + summary. Shadow data fully decoupled — shadow ecosystem is internal competition only.

hypotheses parameter defaults to None. _build_hypothesis_summary handles None and empty list — returns empty string. All HypothesisResult field accesses in _detect_signal_conflicts use getattr() with safe defaults — compatible with older hypothesis objects lacking causal/flow/scenario_tree/fragility_score fields.

_detect_signal_conflicts() at lines 269-314: checks causal vs flow divergence and scenario confidence vs fragility divergence. All field accesses use getattr() with None defaults. Conflicts are additive section in prompt — no mutation of existing structure.

Single public function: async generate_decision(). Helpers (_build_decision_prompt, _build_hypothesis_summary, _detect_signal_conflicts, _parse_decision_response) are module-private with underscore prefix.

notes: DEFINITIVE INTEGRATION AUDIT: shadow_votes parameter fully removed from signature and all callers. Decision module is cleanly isolated — no shadow imports, no gate module imports. Signal conflict detection is additive with safe getattr() access on hypothesis fields. Backward compatible through None defaults and empty-list handling.
